# Upgraded OpenCode Stack - Full Context

## Overview
1:1 Kopie deines kompletten custom OpenCode CLI Setups. Klonen, installieren, fertig — identisch auf jedem MacBook.

Every agent in this setup is connected to the Global-Brain (DPMA v4), which provides persistent memory across all projects.

## What It Does
- **Global-Brain (DPMA v4):** Agents never forget — global architecture rules, saved bugs, forbidden strategies are shared across all projects
- **Local-Brain / GraphRAG:** Project-specific plan memory with auto-invalidation
- **OMOC Swarm:** 5-agent swarm orchestration (Atlas, Hephaestus, Metis, Momus, Prometheus)
- **SIN-Zeus Fleet Commander:** GitHub Projects, Issues, Branches + Hermes dispatch to cloud executors
- **29+ Custom Skills:** A2A Agent Builder, Deploy, Debug, Browser Automation, Image/Video Generation
- **5 Auth Plugins:** Antigravity OAuth (Token Rotation), Qwen OAuth, OpenRouter Proxy, OMO Framework
- **11 CLI Tools:** sin-sync, sin-n8n, sin-telegrambot, sin-rotate, sin-health, and more
- **GitLab Storage:** Infinite storage via auto-rotating GitLab repos (10GB free each)

## Architecture
- **Transport:** MCP stdio + HTTP/MCP
- **Core:** opencode.json config with 5 providers, 21 agents, 13 commands
- **Plugins:** opencode-antigravity-auth, oh-my-opencode, opencode-qwen-auth, opencode-openrouter-auth, gitlab-storage
- **Fleet Sync:** sin-sync script pushes Mac → OCI VM → HF VM configs
- **Storage:** GitLab auto-rotating repos with meta.json tracking

## Quick Start
```bash
git clone https://github.com/Delqhi/upgraded-opencode-stack.git
cd upgraded-opencode-stack
./install.sh
```

## Providers
- **google** (Antigravity): antigravity-claude-sonnet-4-6, antigravity-gemini-3.1-pro, antigravity-gemini-3-flash
- **openai**: gpt-5.4 via OCI Proxy
- **nvidia-nim**: qwen-3.5-122b, qwen-3.5-397b
- **openrouter**: 7 Free models
- **qwen**: qwen/coder-model (Qwen 3.6 Plus, OAuth, 2000/day free)

## Key Commands
- `./install.sh` — Install the full stack
- `sin-sync` — Sync config to OCI VM and HF VMs
- `opencode run "prompt"` — Run OpenCode with default model

## Configuration
See .env.example for all environment variables.
